# Marco Wang Photography

## About
Marco Wang is a fine art wedding photographer specializing in luxury destination weddings. His editorial, film-inspired style emphasizes natural light, timeless composition, and the luminous warmth found in the world's top wedding publications.

## Services
- Destination Wedding Photography (worldwide)
- Editorial Bridal Sessions
- Engagement Photography
- Elopement Photography

## Locations
Based in Houston, Texas, available worldwide. Recent work includes Tuscany (Italy), Hudson Valley (New York), private estates in Texas, and luxury venues across the US and Europe.

## Style
Fine art, editorial, film-inspired. Natural light. Timeless over trendy. Warm, luminous tones. Magazine-quality imagery.

## Booking
Currently accepting select commissions for 2026 and beyond.
Email: info@marcowang.com
Website: https://www.marcowang.com

## Social
Instagram: @marcowangphotography
